{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Subspace Drives
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Subspace Drives]] under [[Tanner Hall]]'s control are faster, more stable, and use less fuel.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Denon Javal's gift allows him to make [[Subspace Drives]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
